query:
UPDATE projects SET
  name = 'City Park Redevelopment',
  description = 'DEMO PROJECT — 40-acre public park orthomosaic survey. 142 drone images stitched into a 2D high-res map. Pre-loaded with utility PDF overlay (sewer/water lines) and engineering CAD (planned structures). Measurement annotations mark the New Playground (4,500 sq ft) and Parking Expansion zones.',
  location = 'Riverside City Park, 1200 Park Blvd, Garland, TX 75040',
  clientName = 'City of Garland — Parks & Recreation Dept.',
  status = 'active',
  dronePilot = 'MAPIT Demo Pilot',
  faaLicenseNumber = 'FA3XXXXXXX',
  laancAuthNumber = 'LAANC-DEMO-2024'
WHERE id = 1;
